bench_setup.notes: EXTI rising-edge trigger test. PA8 generates 10 rising edges; EXTI6 (routed to PA6 via SYSCFG) detects each by polling EXTI_PR. Tests interrupt-controller path independently of GPIO IDR polling. On FAIL: error_code bit0=ERR_EXTI_MISS. detail0=edges detected (0-9). On PASS: detail0 increments each ms.

peripheral_signals.notes: Rising-edge generator, output push-pull. Wire: PA8 → PA6.
EXTI line 6, PORTA selected via SYSCFG_EXTICR2. Wire: PA8 → PA6.
